limitedTime.name: Forge
limitedTime.description: Forge is a Hack Club YSWS (You ship, we ship) program where teens like yourself can design and build hardware projects, and get them funded! Forge your project now

limitedTime.name: Macondo
limitedTime.description: Make projects. Win free prizes. Fly to Bogotá, Colombia for a 3-day scrappy hackathon

limitedTime.name: Fix Hack Club
limitedTime.description: Contribute to Hack Club repositories, get a grant of your choice!

limitedTime.name: Polygon
limitedTime.description: Build a 3d website using three.js and get a grant to go watch your favourite movies!

limitedTime.name: Beest
limitedTime.description: Build a real project, qualify to fly to the Netherlands, and build a mechanical animal at a week-long hackathon.

limitedTime.name: RaspAPI
limitedTime.description: Build an API, get a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W to host it on!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: RaspAPI is a Hack Club YSWS where you build an original, publicly accessible API using any language or framework, log your hours with Hackatime, and earn a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W to host it on. Your API needs at least 3 GET and 1 POST endpoint, docs at /docs, and a public git repo with a README. Reviewers award multipliers based on what your API implements, so the more creative and complex, the better!
steps: Build an original API in any language or framework with at least 3 GET endpoints and 1 POST endpoint
Host it at a stable, publicly accessible URL
Add docs at /docs and a hand-written README in a public git repo
Submit at raspapi.hackclub.com and get a Raspberry Pi Zero 2W!

limitedTime.name: Jus'STUDY
limitedTime.description: Get study stuff by shipping projects that help you and others study!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Jus'STUDY is a YSWS, where you build Study Related Things and get Cool Study Materials in return!
steps: Build a project that helps you or others study!
The project will be sent to certification, then voting.
Submit your project and get cool study materials or rewards in return!

limitedTime.name: Resolution
limitedTime.description: Resolution is an 8-week challenge where you set goals, ship every week, and earn prizes for following through.

limitedTime.name: Flavortown
limitedTime.description: Cook personal projects. Win free prizes.

limitedTime.name: Sleepover
limitedTime.description: Learn to code and fly to an all girls slumber party hackathon!

limitedTime.name: Construct
limitedTime.description: Design projects using CAD, Get a 3d printer to print them!

limitedTime.name: TrailIt
limitedTime.description: Produce A web-app, and get equipment to produce a Video!

limitedTime.name: Remixed
limitedTime.description: Ship something music related, get stuff to help you make music!

limitedTime.name: Enclosure
limitedTime.description: Design a custom enclosure for your project, get a 3D print of it shipped to you and tier based prizes!

limitedTime.name: Stasis
limitedTime.description: Build hardware projects and fly to a hardware hackathon in Austin, Texas

limitedTime.name: Fallout
limitedTime.description: Build 60h of hardware projects, visit Shenzhen, China!

limitedTime.name: Boot
limitedTime.description: Make your own OS, get hardware to run it!

limitedTime.name: Slushies
limitedTime.description: Earn $5 for deploying your Flask app

limitedTime.name: Scraps
limitedTime.description: Create projects, earn scraps, try your luck, get prizes, repeat

limitedTime.name: Reboot
limitedTime.description: Restore old projects, upgrade your desktop setup!

limitedTime.name: HackCraft
limitedTime.description: Create a Minecraft mod, get Stickers, Minecraft, another game or a server and terraria!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Join HackCraft to build and ship your own Minecraft mod. Access exclusive resources and a supportive community.
steps: Submit your mod to Hack Club.
details: Participants will receive a Minecraft Java Edition account, other game like hytale or server upon successful submission.
Support is available through our Slack community.

limitedTime.name: Lumen
limitedTime.description: Make a Minecraft shaderpack, get Minecraft and GPUs!

limitedTime.name: Pxl
limitedTime.description: Code any project, place pixels on a r/place-like canvas!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Pxl is a YSWS where you can either code for pixels (you can double dip this, no need to submit!), or make projects for merch with the final canvas!
steps: Optionally- ship a project for merch!

limitedTime.name: Hackvault
limitedTime.description: You make a password manager and we'll ship you a Yubikey!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Hackvault is the epic YSWS where you can earn either a Yubikey 5C for 5 hours of work making a password manager or for 10 hours a Yubikey Bio! Make anything from a server os for passwords to a mobile app!

limitedTime.name: HomeLab
limitedTime.description: You ship projects related to having a self hosted server at home, and we ship things to help you create your own setup
limitedTime.detailedDescription: A YSWS where you ship projects related to having a self hosted server at home (tracked with hackatime), and we ship things to help you create your own setup (or update a setup you already have!)\

limitedTime.name: Haxmas
limitedTime.description: Do workshops, get prizes! Repeat til Christmas!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Welcome to Haxmas; 12 days of hands-on hacking! From December 13-25, a new workshop drops each day, created by a different member of the Hack Club community. Each workshop is only available on its specific day (day 1's workshop on December 13, day 2's workshop on December 14, and so on), so make sure to participate daily! Each workshop comes with its own special prize, and you'll earn snowflakes that you can redeem for stickers, swag, and more!

limitedTime.name: Meow
limitedTime.description: Spend 5 hours building something to do with cats, get a cat plushie! Ends Christmas Day!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Meow is a Hack Club YSWS where we'll send you a cat plushie if you ship a project to do with cats!
steps: Spend over 5 hours (tracked with Hackatime) building a project to do with cats
details: You can make anything, as long as it's to do with cats, you could make a website, an app, or even a hardware project
Must be shipped (accessible via a URL or as an executable, or fully built for hardware)
US participants receive physical plushie, international participants receive $25 in HCB grant cards to buy their plushie.

limitedTime.name: Woof
limitedTime.description: Spend 5 or more hours making a dog-themed project and get a dog plushie!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Spend 5 hours on a dog related project (with hackatime) and get a dog plushie either shipped from HQ (US only) or through a $25 HCB Grant card.
steps: Spend 5 or more hours coding (tracked with hackatime)
Ship - Fill out the submission form
details: Your project has to be related to dogs
You must track code time with Hackatime and push to GitHub
Your project has to be made by you 🫵
You need a demo link for your project (URL, downloadable executable or fully built for hardware)
US participants receive physical plushie (shipped to address), international participants receive $25 in HCB grant cards to buy their plushie.

limitedTime.name: Mosaic
limitedTime.description: Build a website every month with a different theme. Get stuff. Repeat.
limitedTime.detailedDescription: For 12 months, every month you get a random theme to build a full-stack web application! Earn cool prizes like a 3D Printer Grant and even a 1 year Render Hosting Plan!!
steps: Spend 30 or more hours (tracked with hackatime)

limitedTime.name: Hack Club: The Game
limitedTime.description: Code for 40 hours & fly out to Manhattan to compete in a IRL adventure game!

limitedTime.name: Wacky Files
limitedTime.description: Find the wackiest ways to store files for free and earn $3/hour with multipliers!
limitedTime.detailedDescription:
Sick of cloud-based storage? Own your files the weird way! Find the wackiest and most creative ways to host files for free. Convert binary to static and upload to YouTube, 3D print notches to encode data, or invent something completely absurd - just keep it wacky!

Requirements:
- Must be able to store the test banana image in all its yellow glory
- Solution must be reproducible and documented
- A representation is okay (storing binary without rendering is fine)
- Must be able to upload AND download the file
- Track time with Hackatime (use Lapse for hardware projects)

Earn $3/hour baseline, with voting multipliers: ⭐ = 1x, ⭐⭐ = 2x, ⭐⭐⭐ = 3x
steps: Dream up the wackiest file storage method
details: No CDN or existing solutions used in their intended way
Must be your own creative implementation
The wackier the better!

limitedTime.name: Bauble
limitedTime.description: 3D model an ornament, get it printed and put on the HQ tree! Ends December 25th.
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Bauble is a Hack Club YSWS program where you 3D model an ornament, and you get it printed out put on Oscar, the tree at Hack Club’s HQ in Vermont! After the tree gets taken down, you'll receive your ornament in the mail!
steps: 3D model an ornament in the CAD software of your choosing
details: Your ornament must be modeled by you, models downloaded off the internet do not count
Your ornament must be exported in STL format
Your ornament must have a hole of a minimum 5mm diameter or some other way a hook or string could be attached
Your ornament must be no larger than 100 x 100 x 100 mm in all directions
Your ornament must be appropriate
Your ornament must be able to print without supports

limitedTime.name: Fudge
limitedTime.description: Make any project you want, get fudge right from the Shelburne County Store next to HQ!
limitedTime.detailedDescription:
Ship any project you want (tracked with Hackatime), get fudge from the Shelburne County Store right next to Hack Club HQ.
Work for three hours and get half a pound of fudge, six hours for a full pound.
details: Fudge is shipped from the Shelburne County Store in Shelburne, VT, USA
3 hours for half a pound, 6 hours for a full pound
Hackatime is required
Not limited to the US, but shipping may be expensive and we can't guarantee fudge quality
HCB grant cards are available as an alternative to fudge ($10 for half pound, $20 for full pound)
Fudge is stackable (1 lb for every 6 hours), but be reasonable (higher shipping costs)

limitedTime.name: Remix
limitedTime.description: Remix an existing song's beats in Strudel and get 1 month of Spotify, Apple Music, or SoundCloud Pro

limitedTime.name: Midnight
limitedTime.description: Spend 70 hours building personal projects, fly to a murder mystery hackathon in Vienna, Austria - Jan 2026

limitedTime.name: Axiom
limitedTime.description: YSWS for math/science projects!

limitedTime.name: Accelerate
limitedTime.description: Build physics simulations, get prizes!

limitedTime.name: Blueprint
limitedTime.description: Design a hardware project, up to $400 to build it!

limitedTime.name: Aces
limitedTime.description: Create your own digital board game, get a grant to make it a real physical game, and then get a trip to Washington DC to show off your game to the public at AwesomeCon!

limitedTime.name: The Zoo
limitedTime.description: Make an animal themed Svelte site, earn Ikea Animal Plushies
limitedTime.detailedDescription: The Zoo is a Svelte YSWS where participants build an animal themed Svelte site and earn Mynts (currency) which can be turned into an HCB grant at the end to buy Ikea plushies. Get one giant Djungleskog, or multiple mini Blahaj, it's all up to you. Here's the best part: the better your submission is, the more Mynts you earn!

limitedTime.name: Cœur
limitedTime.description: Make an e-card, earn heart themed prizes (including a sweatshirt!!!)
limitedTime.detailedDescription: E-cards are a really cool and engaging way to send someone a card, and there's so many different things you can do with them! Cœur is a new YSWS where participants build e-cards about something or someone that they like and earn Hearts (currency) which can used to buy different heart themed prizes (including special stickers and a sweatshirt)! Participants can make multiple submissions and save up for bigger prizes!

limitedTime.name: Shiba Arcade
limitedTime.description: Make a game with Godot, earn SSS, and get invited to build an arcade in Tokyo (flight stipends available!)
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Shiba is a two-part adventure about game development. Create a game with Godot (an open-source game engine), earn SSS, use that for shop items, but most importantly, an invitation (and flight stipends) to Tokyo, Japan with 29 other Hack Clubbers to build a pop-up arcade!

limitedTime.name: Milkyway
limitedTime.description: Make games, build houses, and get awesome prizes like a flight to a hyper-immersive game jam in Singapore!

limitedTime.name: Haunted Halloween
limitedTime.description: Make a halloween theme for a website or app, get a custom halloween themed sticker and candy!

limitedTime.name: Dummies V2
limitedTime.description: Learn A new programming language and make a project with that, And We will send you school supplies, books, and study materials

limitedTime.name: Siege
limitedTime.description: Code every week, get prizes. Make it to the end, get a framework!

limitedTime.name: Emerge
limitedTime.description: create an emergent behaviour, place pixels on the group canvas, get the canvas shipped to you!

limitedTime.name: Reactive
limitedTime.description: Ship a website built with React, get $15 to buy a domain.
limitedTime.requirements: Basic knowledge of HTML and CSS, A little knowledge of JavaScript.

limitedTime.name: Hacksaber
limitedTime.description: Ship a Beat Saber Modchart, and we'll ship custom T-Shirt designed by a HC member, or a copy of the game! Live YSWS!

limitedTime.name: Fanpage
limitedTime.description: Ship a project that celebrates a fandom, and we ship you something related to it!

limitedTime.name: Hackberry
limitedTime.description: Built a machine learning project in python, get a personalized raspberry pi kit!

limitedTime.name: Waveform
limitedTime.description: Make your own waveform visualizer, get a grant to buy music

limitedTime.name: birthday-cards
limitedTime.description: You ship a birthday themed project we ship a birthday card!

limitedTime.name: Miniverge
limitedTime.description: Spend 2 hours on a bot, get stickers and a chance for a Blåhaj or Minecraft!

limitedTime.name: Penumbra
limitedTime.description: Make shaders, and we'll ship you GPUs and posters!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Penumbra is a YSWS, where you create shaders on ShaderToy, and get posters of your shaders shipped right to your doorstep! If you spend up to 45 hours across multiple ships, you'll be able to get a GPU like an RTX 3050!

limitedTime.name: Playphone
limitedTime.description: Work together to built a godot game, get a custom hackclub badge
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Playphonee is an event where people take turns working on one godot game, and try to build an amazing game together. Everyone who participates will get a cool hackclub badge

limitedTime.name: Clutter
limitedTime.description: You ship something to organize your digital life. We ship you a grant to buy something to organize your physical life.

limitedTime.name: Fusering
limitedTime.description: Design a keyring, get your keyring and a carabiner to hang it from!

limitedTime.name: iFrame
limitedTime.description: Draw or edit images using any programming language and we will hang your custom image on HQ wall and send a copy to you

limitedTime.name: BakeBuild
limitedTime.description: Design a cookie cutter, get it shipped!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: You ship : A CAD model of a cookie cutter, we ship : A 3D printed model of your custom cookie cutter & cookies!

limitedTime.name: Summer of Making
limitedTime.description: Build stuff. Get stuff. Repeat.

limitedTime.name: RSS
limitedTime.description: Build something cool with RSS feeds, get a domain grant.

limitedTime.name: Moonshot
limitedTime.description: Spend 75 hours building personal projects, fly to a hackathon in Orlando, FL Dec 12–15

limitedTime.name: Hivemind
limitedTime.description: Create a roguelike in 7 days, get itch.io credit.
steps: Create a traditional roguelike in 7 days.
Get $2.50 in itch.io credit for each approved hour you spend.

limitedTime.name: Gemini
limitedTime.description: Ship An Android App and get a FREE Android Phone + Dev License!

limitedTime.name: Endpointer
limitedTime.description: Build a REST API, get a grant for Raspberry Pi or Cloud Credits

limitedTime.name: Portal-VR
limitedTime.description: Build an AR/VR application, get a VR headset!

limitedTime.name: Timeless
limitedTime.description: You have 10 days. Make a video game that could last someone 10 years.

limitedTime.name: Toybox
limitedTime.description: You ship a daily game, we ship stickers + keycap keychain + steam gift card. Make the next Wordle.

limitedTime.name: Dummies
limitedTime.description: learn a new language, recieve a guide book!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Join Dummies to take on projects in new languages and earn grant cards for books!
requirements: resulting project can be seen from a weblink

limitedTime.name: Twist
limitedTime.description: Make an esolang, get stickers and a $40 electronics grant.

limitedTime.name: Infinity
limitedTime.description: Build a website with an infinite realtime canvas, get awesome prizes!

limitedTime.name: Tile
limitedTime.description: Build a tile, get a tile, tile the tiles!

limitedTime.name: Minigame
limitedTime.description: A YSWS where you build "mini" 5 hour games and earn a $20 grant for each one! At the end everyone's games will be combined together to make a big Minigame collection!

limitedTime.name: Squeak
limitedTime.description: Design a mouse case and receive the case and parts!

limitedTime.name: Pathfinder
limitedTime.description: Make a custom PCB controller board and efidget

limitedTime.name: Hackfinger
limitedTime.description: You design a custom appendage (finger, tail, leg, anything you want!) and get your design printed along with a custom control board.

limitedTime.name: Jumpstart
limitedTime.description: Game-dev YSWS running July 9th to Aug 9th ✨

limitedTime.name: Reinforced
limitedTime.description: Build a game, build a bot to beat it, get compute to do more AI stuff.

limitedTime.name: Decode
limitedTime.description: Learn how a tech product works (hardware + software) and we ship you a grant to make it yourself

limitedTime.name: Storyboard
limitedTime.description: Make a visual novel, get $$ for merch/plushie

limitedTime.name: Pulse
limitedTime.description: Build a project using the Spotify API with 6 hours on Hackatime, get 3 months of Spotify Premium

limitedTime.name: Journey
limitedTime.description: The smash-hit Hack Club event where you share insider details of whatever you're building.

limitedTime.name: Railway
limitedTime.description: Build a site with Ruby on Rails, receive stickers!

limitedTime.name: Cinema
limitedTime.description: You ship a short story JavaScript animation using canvas. In return, we ship HQ-made caramel popcorn

limitedTime.name: Spatula
limitedTime.description: You ship an app or script that sends push notifications, we'll give you a $5 grant card so you can start sending SMS messages with your code!

limitedTime.name: Rewind
limitedTime.description: Make an app that runs on Windows XP, get stickers + super cool headphones from KOSS (the KTX Pro 1 or Porta Pros).

limitedTime.name: Illumination
limitedTime.description: You build something with ESP32-S3 emulator, and we give you a super cool ESP32-S3 devboard, custom parts, and cloud credits!

limitedTime.name: Overflow-hidden
limitedTime.description: ysws where you can't use a scrollbar

limitedTime.name: Swirl
limitedTime.description: Create a quality website with Scoops, get ice cream!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Ship a static website (html + css) that has a Scoop, and get a grant for ice cream to enjoy! Scoops are made up of groups of three html / css features that add something of value to the website.

limitedTime.name: Grub
limitedTime.description: You Ship A responsive website using only HTML and Tailwind CSS. We Ship A grant for junk food.
limitedTime.detailedDescription:
The grant amount is based on the number of unique features implemented:
$6 (Basic Meal): For 2 unique features.
$8 (Refreshment Combo): For 4 unique features.
$10 (Full Combo Meal): For 6 or more unique features.

limitedTime.name: Toppings
limitedTime.description: You ship an interactive website using framework-less JavaScript, we ship you a grant to an ice cream parlor.

limitedTime.name: Waffles
limitedTime.description: You ship a website using HTML CSS and JavaScript, and get Waffles!!!

limitedTime.name: Hackmate
limitedTime.description: Build a collaborative app, get upto $50 for cloud credits or a raspberry pi

limitedTime.name: Converge
limitedTime.description: Build Discord/Slack bots, we ship domain names, server hosting, Blahajs, and more

limitedTime.name: Gamefolio
limitedTime.description: Make a interactive portfolio website, get $20 for hosting or domains

limitedTime.name: Extensify
limitedTime.description: Build an IDE extension, get a keychain or a premium theme for VS Code or Sublime Text!

limitedTime.name: Waveband
limitedTime.description: Create a program that uses RTL-SDR, and Hack Club sends you a dongle and antenna kit.

limitedTime.name: Toolsmith
limitedTime.description: Build a AI extension (MCP tool), get $10 of AI credits.

limitedTime.name: Smelt
limitedTime.description: Ship a Svelte/SvelteKit site, get awesome collectable swag!

limitedTime.name: Highway
limitedTime.description: Make any hardware project, get up to 350 USD to build it! Keyboard, game console, rocket, robot, 3d printer, etc... Then, go to a 4-day hardware hackathon @ Github HQ this summer!

limitedTime.name: Cafe
limitedTime.description: Collect cups, progress the graph, earn bonuses!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Work on a personal project in a huddle, get a cup every hour. Getting certain amounts of cups can get you special prizes! See the cafe-bulletin channel for more information!

limitedTime.name: Black Box
limitedTime.description: Create a constrained, interactive C program and get a portable device to run it on!

limitedTime.name: Hackpad
limitedTime.description: Design a keyboard get the parts! Please note this is only open to those who have build a Macropad previously.

limitedTime.name: Sidequests
limitedTime.description: A short-run low-volume low-effort ysws series from nora & co.
limitedTime.detailedDescription:
#1: SkinAmp (ft. phoebe!) - Ship a WinAmp skin, we'll send you the WinAmp source code on CD-R (started 2025-03-26, ended 2025-04-13).
#2: gemerald - Write something useful in Ruby, i'll send you a sticker (best few get a book!) (started 2025-04-10, ended 2025-04-25).

limitedTime.name: Lockin
limitedTime.description: Work on anything Wakatime-able on call with another Hack Clubber, spin for stickers at the end of the session.

limitedTime.name: BrowserBuddy
limitedTime.description: Build a Chrome extension, and Hack Club provides $30 to launch it on Chrome Web Store.

limitedTime.name: TerminalCraft
limitedTime.description: Build a terminal program and earn 5$ per hour for building your program to get hackable hardware.
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Build & publish a cross-platform terminal app. Be creative, open-source it, and snag your grant !

limitedTime.name: Pixeldust
limitedTime.description: Make a neopixel based PCB, get the parts to make one!
limitedTime.detailedDescription: Create a PCB using KiCad / other EDA. It should use neopixels and a Xiao RP2040, and act as a decoration. Once submitted you can get the parts to make one yourself!

limitedTime.name: Juice
limitedTime.description: Spend 100 hours in 2 months building a game, and we'll cover your Steam release and fund a flight to China for a pop-up shop.

limitedTime.name: Jungle
limitedTime.description: Spend time working on your game, get money to help publish it! Prizes include steam license, itch.io asset store credits, and much much more!

limitedTime.name: Infill
limitedTime.description: Design your own 3D printer mod, get $20 to build it!

limitedTime.name: Visioneer
limitedTime.description: Give your computer the gift of vision, get an esp32-s3-eye to see it through!

limitedTime.name: Hacklet
limitedTime.description: Spend two hours building a creative javascript bookmarklet, get $10 to buy a domain!

limitedTime.name: Asylum
limitedTime.description: Fast-paced hardware YSWS challenges.

limitedTime.name: Printboard
limitedTime.description: Design a 3D model that goes with the Ikea Skadis pegboard, and we will send you one!

limitedTime.name: Minus Twelve
limitedTime.description: Create a useful tool and receive a shiny new microcontroller!

limitedTime.name: Hackapet
limitedTime.description: Make a pet game, get a hackable tamagotchi clone!

limitedTime.name: Dessert
limitedTime.description: Make an Android app and earn a paid Google Developer account.

limitedTime.name: Cascade
limitedTime.description: Create animations with CSS and receive art supplies.

limitedTime.name: Riceathon
limitedTime.description: Customize your Linux install, and get programmer socks or a Blåhaj.

limitedTime.name: Hacky Holidays
limitedTime.description: Design a PCB holiday decoration this winter, get one shipped.

limitedTime.name: Retrospect (J2ME edition)
limitedTime.description: Create a J2ME game (Java MIDlet) and have it delivered on a J2ME-capable phone.

limitedTime.name: Hackaccino
limitedTime.description: Build a 3D website and get a free frappuccino.

limitedTime.name: Cider
limitedTime.description: Create an iOS app and receive a $100 Apple Developer account to publish it.

limitedTime.name: 10 Days of Tarot
limitedTime.description: Build a project or feature and get exclusive prizes for each card requirement you hit.

limitedTime.name: Thunder
limitedTime.description: You Ship A Slack bot. We Ship A limited edition Orpheus bucket hat.

limitedTime.name: Shipwrecked
limitedTime.description: You Ship 60 hours of work, 4 projects, and go viral. We Ship A ticket to an island hackathon in Boston.
limitedTime.detailedDescription: You ship 60 hours of coding work, four shipped projects, and make one of them go viral. We ship you a ticket to Shipwrecked, a four-day, in-person hackathon on Cathleen Stone Island in the Boston Harbor, with travel stipends available.

limitedTime.name: Neighborhood
limitedTime.description: You Ship 100 hours of coding on one project. We Ship A free summer of coding in San Francisco.
limitedTime.detailedDescription: You ship 100 hours of coding work on a single, new, open-source project. We ship you a flight to San Francisco and cover your housing, food, and transit for up to three months while you code with other teenagers.

recentlyEnded.name: Carnival
recentlyEnded.description: Build an extension, plugin, or widget get prizes

recentlyEnded.name: Armed
recentlyEnded.description: Develop an arm assembly program, get lego.

recentlyEnded.name: Authly
recentlyEnded.description: Build the weirdest and never-before-seen authentication system, get yubikeys, programmable nfc tags, antivirus giftcards and more!

recentlyEnded.name: Silicon
recentlyEnded.description: Design your own custom devboard and we'll fund it

recentlyEnded.name: cmd + k
recentlyEnded.description: Build a Raycast extension, get Raycast Pro & stickers

recentlyEnded.name: Solder
recentlyEnded.description: Design and solder your own custom PCB with a free electronics kit!

indefinite.name: iplace
indefinite.description: A collaborative canvas of websites, made by Hack Clubbers! Get hosting and domain credits!

indefinite.name: Hacklet v2
indefinite.description: Build a bookmarklet, get food for your club!

indefinite.name: Terminal Craft v5
indefinite.description: Build and publish your own terminal program to earn $4/hr

indefinite.name: Sprig
indefinite.description: Build a JS game and play it on your own console.

indefinite.name: OnBoard
indefinite.description: Design a PCB and we'll fabricate it for you.

indefinite.name: Boba Drops
indefinite.description: Build a website and get boba!

indefinite.name: Boba Olympics
indefinite.description: Hack Clubbers team up to build websites in wild weekly categories

indefinite.name: Storyboard
indefinite.description: Make a themed visual novel, earn prizes!

indefinite.name: OnBoard Live
indefinite.description: Design a PCB live on YouTube for $5/hour PCB credit.

indefinite.name: foodie
indefinite.detailedDescription: you ship a food related project, we ship food credits!

drafts.name: Hackanomous
drafts.description:
Build into AI. Get funding
and win prizes!
drafts.detailedDescription:
hack club's dedicated AI/ML YSWS!

the AI bubble just might be about to pop. too much AI hype yet slop exists in this world. build projects incorporating AI that solve real-world problems. we might even send you an RTX 5090!

drafts.name: Alchemize
drafts.description: Make general projects, or one of the 3 theme-based projects and earn Potion Mix to get the prizes you choose
steps: Make Projects and Track Hours with Hackatime
Earn Currency for the specific theme, or earn Potion Mix directly from shipping a general project
Convert the Theme Currency to Potion Mix(with a fun little bonus if you convert them together)
Get items from the Dynamic Shop, so you get to add your own item to the shop.

drafts.name: Rootship
drafts.description: Learn system penetration, earn hacking themed prizes!
steps: Take the Rootship path, a hand-picked selection of TryHackMe rooms, to earn your root status.
Improve your skills as you navigate through increasingly difficult rooms.
Complete your path and receive TryHackMe Premium plus access to the Shop.
Conquer difficult rooms, collect coins, and redeem them for cool prizes in the Shop.

drafts.name: Track it
drafts.description: Build a map app, GeoGuessr-style game, or GPS tracker. Explore the world. Win prizes.

drafts.name: Kit Lab
drafts.description: Build software according to themes and gets kits to build projects and ship projects made using only the kit electronics and get prizes!

drafts.name: Rooted
drafts.description: Spend time coding, come to BornHack 🏕️ ∣ RSVP
drafts.detailedDescription: Spend time on projects and get a ticket to come to Hack Clubs site at BornHack! STILL A WIP, RSVP NOW!

drafts.name: Shrine
drafts.description: Make and code a project about your favorite fictional character, get a grant to buy merch of your character!
drafts.detailedDescription: Shrine is a YSWS where you build a project (Must be tracked with Hackatime) about your favorite fictional character! It could be anything! Like, a website about your character, a Visual Novel with RenPy, anything related to that character! After you submit and we check your project, you'll receive a grant to go buy merch of your favorite character!

drafts.detailedDescription: you code to design hack-themed apparel, we ship popular designs as real clothes!

drafts.description: You Ship a Home Assistant with Software,PCB and Case, We Ship a grant ($150 Max)to make it.
drafts.detailedDescription: Build a home assistant with Software,PCB and Case . We will send u a grant ($150 Max)to make it.

drafts.name: Hackumentary
drafts.description: You Ship a project with dev vlogs, We Ship points through which you can buy goodies
drafts.detailedDescription: Build a project with daily dev vlogs, we ship you points for every dev vlog you create, which you can use to purchase exciting goodies after shipping your project

drafts.name: Reef
drafts.description: Ship a deep learning project (AI/ML/LLM/NN), get a custom coral based accelerator.

drafts.description: Create a song using open-source music software and receive a vinyl with your song.

drafts.name: Hack Store
drafts.description: Use a free alternative app store and get a Google Developer account.

drafts.name: Light Up
drafts.description: Design an electronic circuit with lights, and Hack Club sends you the components and gifts.

drafts.name: Aether
drafts.description: Build a Windows app, and Hack Club provides a Microsoft Store developer account.

drafts.name: Onward
drafts.description: Build a robot using Arduino and receive one.

drafts.name: PicoJam
drafts.description: Create a PICO-8 game, get a PICO-8 license for free!
drafts.detailedDescription: Use PICO-8 Education Edition to build a game with your own assets (art, sound effects, etc). Your game should have a basic goal and at least 2 minutes of gameplay. The top winner will receive a Physical PICO-8 Emulator Device!

drafts.name: Hack the Line
drafts.description: Get an Asterisk server running, and we'll send you a VoIP phone.

drafts.name: Constellation
drafts.description: You ship a self host, full stack website, we ship a Raspberry Pi Zero 2 W to host it on

drafts.name: Jetsu
drafts.description: You ship a ML Robot, We ship a Jetson Nano / Jetson Orin Nano
drafts.detailedDescription:
Event Dates: 1st June to 31st July
Participants will receive the necessary funding to build their robots.
Before funding, participants must:
  - Submit a Bill of Materials (BOM) listing the expected components.
  - Submit their initial machine learning project on GitHub with a well-documented README.
Machine learning models will be developed on laptops to control the robots.
Coding activity will be tracked using WakaTime.
Participants must log their work hours in a detailed project journal.
Rewards & Incentives:
  - All participants who successfully complete the project will receive a Jetson Nano Developer Kit (4GB).
  - Those who invest 100+ hours will be rewarded with a NVIDIA Jetson Orin (8GB).

drafts.name: Say Cheese!
drafts.description: Fit a program in a QR code, get a portable printer and maybe a Blåhaj.
drafts.detailedDescription: Fit a program inside a QR code, and get a potentially cat-themed portable printer! The best project gets a Blåhaj.

drafts.name: Cargo Cult
drafts.description: Build a Rust CLI and get a Rust book.

drafts.name: Winter Boba Drops

drafts.name: The hackbook
drafts.description: Write segments on almost anything, get the hackbook shipped to you and win prizes!

drafts.name: Rework
drafts.description: CAD a 3d printer mod, get $75 and 1kg of Hack Club filament to build it!
drafts.detailedDescription: Hack Club Rework gives you $75 + exclusive free filament to physically modify your 3D printer. Got an old Ender 3? Make it print faster. Got a Bambu? Hack it and add custom features. Have a unique idea? Make it happen. Rework is made for all hardware based 3d printer mods. Design submissions for Rework end on March 6th, 2026. Get started early and post your progress in the Hack Club Slack!

drafts.name: Hack a Home
drafts.description: Mod, tweak, and upgrade your devices — earn grants to buy IoT hardware.
drafts.detailedDescription: Mod, tweak, and upgrade your devices — earn grants to buy IoT hardware. No experience required. Just curiosity, a screwdriver, and something at home worth hacking.
details: Support is available through our Slack community.
